title: Personal Treasure Loot
description: Personal Treasure Loot makes structure chests truly personal on Fabric servers. Each player receives their own loot roll the first time they open a structure chest, no more rushing or fighting over treasure.
body:
# Personal Treasure Loot

Personal Treasure Loot makes structure chests truly personal on Fabric servers. Each player receives their own loot roll the first time they open a structure chest
no more rushing or fighting over treasure.

## Features

- **Per-player loot** – Every player gets their own virtual inventory for each structure chest. Loot rolls the first time they open it.
- **Break protection** – Players must sneak to remove a personal chest, and the mod drops any items they left inside. Breaking is blocked entirely if anyone still has the GUI open.
- **Deposit blocker** – Once you’ve looted a chest, you can’t stuff extra items into it. (Shift-click/drag inserts are prevented.)
- **Visual hints** – A subtle client particle (only visible to the owning player) marks nearby chests that still contain their loot.
- **Server-side** – Runs entirely on the dedicated server.

##notes 
- This is chests only. Minecart chests, barrels, etc are still one times
- This mod is created with a new world in mind. I do not support adding it to an existing world afterwards, its not **tested** or the expected use case. 


I made this because I couldn't find a server side only mod that did this for fabric 1.21.10
